output.formatted:
The TV series 'Supernatural' concluded its run with its final episode airing on March 10, 2020, so there are no new episodes scheduled.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?endDate WHERE {
  wd:Q130585 wdt:P576 ?endDate
}
```

Using entities:
- Supernatural (wd:Q130585), also known as "SPN":
  - American dark fantasy television series
  - is instance of television series

Using properties:
- dissolved, abolished or demolished date (wd:P576 as wdt), also known as "abolished", "abolishment date", "ceased date", "ceased on", "ceased publication", etc.:
  - point in time at which the subject (organisation, building) ... equipment, "discontinued date" (P2669) for stopping a product
